title: Ranch Dressing
tagline: Homemade ranch destroys bottled. Creamy, herby, and ready in 5 minutes.
description: The classic American dressing and dip. Buttermilk, mayo, herbs, and garlic. Use on salads, wings, pizza, or anything that needs dipping.
ingredients: 1 Tbsp fresh dill, minced (or 1 tsp dried)
steps: Whisk together mayonnaise, sour cream, and buttermilk until smooth.
Add chives, dill, parsley, garlic, onion powder, salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
Whisk until combined. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Refrigerate at least 30 minutes before serving to let flavors meld.
Thin with more buttermilk if needed for dressing consistency. Keep thicker for dipping.
notes: No buttermilk: Mix 1/2 cup milk with 1/2 Tbsp lemon juice. Let sit 5 minutes.
Dried herbs: Use 1 tsp each dried chives, dill, and parsley if fresh aren't available.
Make it a dip: Use less buttermilk for thicker consistency.
Greek yogurt: Substitute for sour cream for a lighter version.
